content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886


June 23, 2005


Barbara Riegel Wayne, City Clerk
City of Oceanside
Department of the City Clerk
City Hall North
300 North Coast Highway
Oceanside, CA 92054-2885

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. 05-121

Dear Ms. Wayne:

Thank you for your letter of June 7, 2005, regarding a mass mailing which was sent to Oceanside municipal election voters earlier this month.

Your correspondence and a copy of the mailing will be forwarded to the Enforcement Division of the Fair Political Practices Commission for review of the potential violation you have alleged. You will be advised by the Enforcement Division of their determination at a future date.

Very truly yours,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

LM/jg

embedding.qa_text: The letter is from the Fair Political Practices Commission to Barbara Riegel Wayne, City Clerk of Oceanside. The Commission thanks her for her letter regarding a mass mailing sent to Oceanside municipal election voters and informs her that their correspondence and a copy of the mailing will be forwarded to the Enforcement Division for review. The Commission will advise her of their determination at a future date. Your correspondence and a copy of the mailing will be forwarded to the Enforcement Division of the Fair Political Practices Commission for review of the potential violation you have alleged. You will be advised by the Enforcement Division of their determination at a future date. Very truly yours, [signature] Luisa Menchaca General Counsel LM/jg
